children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In this subchapter, the terms defined in the Migratory Bird Conservation Act ( et seq.) and the Migratory Bird Treaty Act ( et seq.) have the meanings given those terms in those Acts.16 U.S.C. 71516 U.S.C. 703

children.heading: Hunting year
children.label: 1 Hunting year
children.text: The term “hunting year” means the 1-year period beginning on July 1 of each year.

children.heading: Migratory waterfowl
children.label: 2 Migratory waterfowl
children.text: The term “migratory waterfowl” means the species enumerated in paragraph (a) of subdivision 1 of article I of the Convention between the United States and Great Britain for the Protection of Migratory Birds, signed at Washington on (USTS 628) ( et seq.).August 16, 191616 U.S.C. 703

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.

children.label: F
children.text: the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands;

children.label: H
children.text: the Republic of the Marshall Islands;

children.label: A
children.text: to pursue, hunt, shoot, capture, collect, or kill; or

children.label: B
children.text: to attempt to pursue, hunt, shoot, capture, collect, or kill.
